title: Monthly Budget Risk Threshold
content: If monthly expense exceeds 85 percent of income, provide top three expense categories and a concrete reduction plan for next month.

title: Actionable Advice Format
content: Finance advice should include numeric targets, timeline, and one immediate next step.

title: Mandatory Risk Disclaimer
content: Stock answers must include risk disclaimer and avoid certainty words such as guaranteed profit.

title: Recency Disclosure
content: If quote data is delayed, clearly disclose timestamp and data recency limitation.

title: Grounding Priority
content: Always prioritize tool output and retrieved knowledge snippets over generic model priors.
